zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Isham於大約1348年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾利時，他的父親Henry de Isham29歲，母親Mrs. Agnes de Isham40歲。他於1373年與Julian在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1424年3月13日在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Isham于大约1348年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾利时，他的父亲Henry de Isham29岁，母亲Mrs. Agnes de Isham40岁。他于1373年与Julian在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1424年3月13日在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾利。

nameMeanings.name: Isham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): habitational name from Isham, Northamptonshire. See   Isom  , compare   Esham  .

variants.name: Esham
meanings: English: variant of   Isham  . This surname is no longer found in Britain.
History: The name is first recorded in Northamton County, VA, when Daniel Esham came over as an indentured servant in 1651.

variants.name: Isom
meanings: English (Essex): habitational name from Isham in Northamptonshire. The placename is derived from the river name Ise (of Celtic origin) + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

variants.name: Ishman
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Isham  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Isham was born about 1348, in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Henry de Isham, was 29 and his mother, Mrs. Agnes de Isham, was 40. He married Julian in 1373, in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 March 1424, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Isham est né environ 1348, à Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry de Isham, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Agnes de Isham, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Julian en 1373, à Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1424, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Isham um 1348 in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Isham 29 und seine Mutter Mrs. Agnes de Isham 40. Er hat 1373 in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Julian geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. März 1424 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Isham è nato il circa 1348 nel Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Henry de Isham, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Agnes de Isham, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Julian nel 1373, nel Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 marzo 1424, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Ishamが約1348年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプイトチリーで生まれた時，父Henry de Ishamは29歳，母Mrs. Agnes de Ishamは40歳であった。1373年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプイトチリーでJulianと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1424年3月13日に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプイトチリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Isham(이)가 대략 1348년 영국 노르섬프토실르 p이트클리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Isham(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Agnes de Isham(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1373년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 p이트클리에서 Julian(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1424년 3월 13일 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 p이트클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Isham nasceu aproximadamente 1348, em Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Isham, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Agnes de Isham, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Julian em 1373, em Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1424, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Isham родился около 1348 г. в местности пичли, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Isham было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Agnes de Isham, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Julian в 1373 г. в местности пичли, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 марта 1424 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности пичли, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Isham nació aproximadamente 1348, en Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Isham, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mrs. Agnes de Isham, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Julian en 1373, en Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1424, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
